title: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on the main characters as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 26 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
